Interface ISpectralLibrary

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to a SpectralLibrary Interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("024048CA-EB92-4334-BE34-A4F2BF607F05")]
public interface ISpectralLibrary

Gets the Spectral Library array of Samples.

IArray
